ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ic_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IC model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the IC model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the IC model */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the IC model started production */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the IC model ended production */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer of the IC model */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number assigned by the manufacturer */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Type of package (e.g., QFP, BGA) */,
  "pin_count" INTEGER /* Number of pins or contacts */,
  "operating_temperature_range" TEXT /* Range of operating temperatures (e.g., -40°C to 85°C) */,
  "power_supply_voltage_range" TEXT /* Range of power supply voltages (e.g., 1.8V to 3.6V) */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ic_models_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timing_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IC model to which the parameter belongs */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the timing parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the timing parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the timing parameter */,
  "typ_value" REAL /* Typical value of the timing parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the timing parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the timing parameter */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition under which the timing parameter is measured */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance or margin of error for the timing parameter */,
  "test_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether a test is required for this parameter */,
  "test_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of testing (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the parameter */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES ic_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_parameters_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IC model being tested */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., functional, stress, compliance) */,
  "test_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used for the test */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the test */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the test */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES ic_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test condition */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test to which the condition belongs */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the test condition */,
  "condition_value" TEXT /* Value of the test condition */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the test condition */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance or margin of error for the condition */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the condition */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_conditions_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_conditions_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., design engineer, test engineer, quality assurance) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_password_change_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last changed their password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or client used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ic_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IC model to which the version belongs */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the IC model */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes or updates in the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, released, obsolete) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ic_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ic_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES ic_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ic_versions_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ic_versionParameters" (
  "version_param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version-specific timing parameter */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version to which the parameter belongs */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timing parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the timing parameter */,
  "typ_value" REAL /* Typical value of the timing parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the timing parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the timing parameter */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition under which the timing parameter is measured */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance or margin of error for the version-specific parameter */,
  "test_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether a test is required for this version-specific parameter */,
  "test_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of testing for this version-specific parameter */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version-specific parameter */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the version-specific parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ic_versionParameters_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES ic_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ic_versionParameters_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES timing_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ic_versionParameters_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ic_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IC model to which the document belongs */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., datasheet, test report) */,
  "doc_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "document_version" TEXT /* Version number of the document */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., draft, final, obsolete) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was approved */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the document */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the document */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ic_documents_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ic_documents_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ic_documents_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES ic_models ("model_id")
)
